underlying_goal: Format a masterfile CSV into a usable multi-sheet spreadsheet with formatting, then push changes to git repos
friction_detail: Claude initially created a Google Apps Script instead of directly modifying/converting the file, prompting user to redirect with 'can you just modify the csv file?!'
brief_summary: User wanted a CSV masterfile converted into a formatted multi-sheet spreadsheet and changes pushed to two repos; achieved after a course correction from Apps Script to direct XLSX generation.
